name: SEO
author: Squilla
description: Owns /robots.txt, SEO defaults (meta title/description/OG/Twitter), and AI-crawler policy. Pairs with sitemap-generator for the full search-engine surface.

settings.title: SEO
settings.description: Search engine and social-card defaults. Per-node SEO settings always win.

sections.title: SEO
sections.description: Site-wide SEO defaults. Per-node SEO settings always win.

fields.label: Default Meta Title
fields.help: Used when a page has no Meta Title set. ≤60 chars recommended.

fields.label: Default OG Image
fields.help: Fallback for og:image / twitter:image when a page has no featured image. 1200×630 recommended.

fields.label: OG Site Name
fields.help: Emitted as og:site_name. Falls back to Site Name when blank.

fields.label: Allow search engines to index this site
fields.help: When off, every public page emits noindex,nofollow (and the X-Robots-Tag header). Use OFF during staging.
fields.warning: This setting is per-language. To hide the entire site from search, switch the language picker and toggle this OFF for every active language.

settings.title: Robots & AI Crawlers
settings.description: Controls /robots.txt — what classic search engines and AI crawlers may do with your content. The SEO indexing master switch (Site Settings → SEO) overrides everything here when off.

sections.title: AI Crawler Policy
sections.description: Two distinct cohorts. Training crawlers feed model corpora. Search crawlers fetch live when a user asks an AI assistant.

fields.label: Allow AI training crawlers
fields.help: Off blocks GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, CCBot, Meta-ExternalAgent, Bytespider, Amazonbot, and ~15 other training crawlers.
fields.warning: Training opt-out is best-effort: it relies on each vendor honouring robots.txt. Sticky badges only — no enforcement.

fields.label: Allow AI answer-engine crawlers
fields.help: Off blocks ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, MistralAI-User, DuckAssistBot, etc.

fields.label: Additional Disallow paths
fields.help: One path per line. Appended to the User-agent: * block alongside the built-in /admin, /auth, /api defaults.

fields.label: Custom robots.txt block
fields.placeholder:
# Slow this one bot down
User-agent: SpecialBot
Crawl-delay: 10
fields.help: Appended verbatim at the end. Use for vendor-specific directives, Crawl-delay, or comments.

fields.label: Sitemap URL override
fields.help: Defaults to <site_url>/sitemap.xml. Override if your sitemap lives elsewhere.
